arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: It’s my responsibility to solve Manchester City’s poor run
arts.sum: City have lost their last five matches after being thrashed 4-0 by Tottenham on Saturday.

arts.ttl: The signs of Man City’s alarming decline were there for all to see
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side have lost five games in a row - with Rodri’s injury exposing problems that were evident last season

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski explains form and remarkable Man City record: ‘I have something no other player has’
arts.sum: Kulusevski scored in three straight games at Man City, before starring in the 4-0 win against the champions on Saturday

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski cannot wait to play Man City again after Tottenham run riot
arts.sum: The Sweden midfielder hailed Saturday’s 4-0 thrashing of the champions as the best game of his career.

arts.ttl: 'Not good enough' - Pep Guardiola responds to Erling Haaland concern at Man City
arts.sum: Guardiola has pointed to problems all over the pitch after City lost a fifth game in a row

arts.ttl: Gary Neville hails five Tottenham players for obliterating Man City in huge Premier League win
arts.sum: Spurs make light work of Premier League champions in stunning 4-0 victory

arts.ttl: Gary Neville claims the 'pressure is on Arsenal' after Man City's crisis continues
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s side ended four-game winless run with 3-0 victory over Nottingham Forest

arts.ttl: As Man City spiral, Liverpool open historic lead in title race
arts.sum: With Ruben Amorim debuting with Manchester United at Ipswich Town on Sunday and Manchester City's crisis continuing to unfold with their latest defeat, the Premier League was not short of storylines this weekend, but Liverpool going eight points clear at the top of the table over Guardiola's men is the main takeaway. Álvaro Rodríguez's 70th-minute strike in their 2-0 win over Real Valladolid on Friday was Getafe's first goal from open play all season -- as a reminder, we're now on matchday 14, three months into the campaign.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland & Viktor Gyokeres made to wait? Barcelona plan big contract call with Robert Lewandowski that would impact future transfer plans
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering extending Robert Lewandowsk's contract despite being linked with Erling Haaland and Viktor Gyokeres. Barcelona plan big contract call with Robert Lewandowski that would impact future transfer plans
